question: What are the names of regions in which there are no buildings?
sql: SELECT r.Name FROM region r LEFT JOIN building b ON r.Region_ID = b.Region_ID WHERE b.Building_ID IS NULL;

back_translation.intent: 查找没有建筑物的地区

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，正确关联region和building表，通过b.Building_ID IS NULL过滤条件筛选无建筑物的地区，选择列r.Name与问题要求一致，无聚合、分组、排序等额外操作
